name: nano-kanban
description: Shared task board for AI agents. Bundles the MCP server config and skill instructions for coordinating work through the board.

interface.shortDescription: Shared task board for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Coordinate multi-agent work through a shared kanban board backed by a local MCP server and live dashboard.
defaultPrompt: Set up a nano-kanban board for these tasks.
Work through the tasks on my nano-kanban board.
